Atty. STEPHEN C. TEDESCO, ESQ. of Littler Mendelson, P.C., Tel No. 415-433-1940 appearing for Defendant HWA May Market, Inc.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear. Matter discussed by the Court and counsel. The Court orders as follows: PLAINTIFFS JESUS GUTIERREZ, ALBERTO RAVELL AND BENJAMIN VICENTE'S Motion For: (1) Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement; (2) Preliminary Certification Of Settlement Class; And (3) Approval Of Notice Of Class Action Lawsuit is granted. A final approval hearing shall be set for 6/29/16 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. Parties are to revise the claim notice to state that objections may be made at the final approval hearing. Parties are to revise the proposed order to include all the necessary exhibit attachments, and re-submit the revised proposed order to the Court for signature.
